title: Vector shard README flow omits the vec_memories query surface it declares
evidence: Line 112 declares `vec_memories` is a sqlite-vec `vec0` virtual table used for query/index. The flow diagram at lines 148-156 says lazy create "vec_metadata, embedding_cache and vec_<dim>" and that "search and reindex run through active_vec.vec_<dim>", never mentioning `vec_memories`. Code creates `active_vec.vec_memories` (vector-index-store.ts:816) and the read path falls back to it for the default embedder (vector-index-queries.ts:117-122).
fix: Add `vec_memories` to the lazy-create list and update the search box to "active_vec.vec_<dim> (or active_vec.vec_memories for the default embedder)".
angle: Shard-split reference pass for `context-index__`, `resolveActiveProfileDbPath`, `vec_<dim>`, and `active_vec` wording across memory references.
